text:
Klaus, called simply Pastor in the English game version, is a character from the game Fullmetal Alchemist and the Broken Angel.

He is a priest who is friends with the Eiselstein family, especially Armony Eiselstein. At the end of the game, it is revealed that Klaus also possesses alchemical skills, as he performs alchemical gestures and induces transmutation.

Trivia

His name is only given in the subtitles in the original game.
